title: Dungeons Style
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AZaZTrT0/images/2ce426887c6177142c7fd0cf1a86e56ceed86b0e.png)

NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT

This resource pack changes some of the vanilla textures to look like the textures from Minecraft's spinoff game Minecraft Dungeons. 

Most of the textures were ripped from Minecraft Dungeons or made by me and the other people in the project.

 

All music in this resource pack is from Minecraft Dungeons and was made by Peter Hont

This resource pack is (or will be when they're updated) compatible with the mods **Dungeons Mobs,**  **Enchant With Mob,** and **ToroHealth Damage Indicators.**
